name: Garrick Table Lamp - 22 Inch Height - TBL9016 - Black - Safavieh
description: Discover elegance with the Garrick 22 inch black mop table lamp. Designed to enhance any space, its sleek black finish combined with the rich texture of mop material creates a striking centerpiece for your room. Perfect for adding warmth and ambiance, this lamp blends style and function seamlessly. Whether placed on a bedside table or a living room console, its versatile design complements both modern and classic decor. Embrace the sophisticated charm of the Garrick lamp and illuminate your home with grace.
